app.name: InstaTools
app.one_liner: A modular Python-based toolkit for Instagram automation, scraping, and reconnaissance.

screens.name: Main Tool Selector
screens.purpose: Display available Instagram automation tools and guide user to select one for execution.

rust_commands.name: run_instagram_tool
rust_commands.purpose: Execute a specified InstaTools script (e.g., mutuals.py, poirot.py) with given parameters after cookie authentication.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add basic error handling for HTTP 401 failures
week 1: Integrate core scraping tools (Poirot, Spider)
acceptance_tests: Poirot extracts email and phone number from public profiles when available
Script execution can be safely interrupted with Ctrl+C and exits cleanly
Tool successfully imports cookies without HTTP 401 error
User can run any tool from the documented list (e.g., Mutuals, Tracker) via CLI
